name: Subflow
description: Execute another workflow as a subflow.
doc:
Run another workflow as part of this flow.

Usage:
• Select a workflow to execute
• Input is passed to the subflow
• Output returns the subflow's result

Difference from Macros:
• Subflows run a complete workflow
• Macros are designed for reusable components with defined inputs/outputs

Tip: Use subflows to organize complex automations into smaller, manageable pieces.
